{{Quote|Looks like a few Tusken Raiders are camped out on the Canyon Dune Turn.|Fodesinbeed Annodue mentions UrrOr'Ruur and his companions during podracer commentary|audio=Fode-TuskenRaiders.flac|<ref name="TPM">{{Film|I}}</ref>}}
'''UrrOr'Ruur''' was a [[Tusken Raider/Legends|Tusken Raider]] warrior who was part of a group of at least four other Tuskens that, while at the [[Mos Espa Circuit]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], hoped to take out [[Podracer (profession)/Legends|podracers]] and their [[Podracer/Legends|vehicles]] during the [[Boonta Eve Classic/Legends|Boonta Eve Classic]]. During the [[Boonta Eve Classic (32 BBY)/Legends|Boonta Eve Classic]] of [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], UrrOr'Ruur and his group shot at the podracers going though [[Canyon Dune Turn/Legends|Canyon Dune Turn]].

==Biography==
UrrOr'RuuR was a [[Tusken Raider/Legends|Tusken Raider]] sniper<ref name="CSWE" /> and warrior<ref name="YJCCG" /> who was part of a small group<ref name="CSWE" /> of at least four other Tusken Raiders,<ref name="TPM" /> including the leader [[Orr'UrRuuR'R/Legends|Orr'UrRuuR'R]]<ref name="Orr">{{YJCCG|set=Boonta Eve Podrace|cardname=Orr'UrRuuR'R|link=boontaevepodrace/dark/large/36orrurruurrtuskenraider.html}}</ref> and the sniper [[RuuR'Ur]],<ref name="Ruu">{{YJCCG|set=Boonta Eve Podrace|cardname=RuuR'Ur|link=boontaevepodrace/dark/large/38ruururtuskenraidersniper.html}}</ref> that lined themselves on the [[Mos Espa Circuit]],<ref name="CSWE" /> a [[Podracing/Legends|podracing]] course outside the [[City/Legends|city]] [[Mos Espa/Legends|Mos Espa]]<ref name="Mos Espa Circuit CSWE">{{CSWECite|II|334|Mos Espa Circuit}}</ref> on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].<ref name="Tatooine">{{CSWECite|III|224|Tatooine}}</ref> While there, they hoped to take out [[Podracer (profession)/Legends|podracers]] and their [[Podracer/Legends|vehicles]] while they raced in the [[Boonta Eve Classic/Legends|Boonta Eve Classic]],<ref name="CSWE" /> an annual event to commemorate the [[Boonta Eve/Legends|Boonta Eve]] holiday.<ref name="Boonta">{{DB|organization|boontapodrace|Boonta Eve Classic Podracers}}</ref> The trouble caused by the Tusken Raiders during the race had become a popular attraction and, as a result, anonymous complaints by pilots to race officials did not lead to anything.<ref name="Complete Locations">[[Star Wars: Complete Locations (2005)|''Star Wars: Complete Locations'']]</ref> 

[[File:Tuskens canyon.png|thumb|right|300px|UrrOr'RuuR and his companions camped out on Canyon Dune Turn.]]
During the [[Boonta Eve Classic (32 BBY)/Legends|Boonta Eve Classic]]<ref name="TPM" /> of the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]],<ref name="Date">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates the events of {{Film|I}}, which includes the [[Boonta Eve Classic (32 BBY)/Legends|Boonta Eve Classic]], to [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]].</ref> UrrOr'Ruur and<ref name="TPM" /> his<ref name="YJCCG" /> group were camped at<ref name="TPM" /> the cliffs above<ref name="Complete Locations" /> [[Canyon Dune Turn/Legends|Canyon Dune Turn]] in the circuit. During the first lap, race commentator<ref name="TPM" /> [[Fodesinbeed Annodue/Legends|Fodesinbeed Annodue]]<ref name="FF121">{{FactFile|121|TRO 1-2|Troigs}}</ref> mentioned the Tuskens. The group communicated with each other, before UrrOr'Ruur, laying prone on the turn, took<ref name="TPM" /> pot shots<ref name="Complete Locations" /> at the passing podracers. They cheered after all the racers passed. During the second lap, he stayed in his position and continued to shoot at the racers. One of the Tusken Raiders landed a shot on the [[Teemto Pagalies' Podracer/Legends|podracer]] of racer [[Teemto Pagalies/Legends|Teemto Pagalies]], destroying it.<ref name="TPM" />

==Equipment==
During the Boonta Eve Classic<ref name="TPM" /> of 32 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]],<ref name="Date" /> he wore [[Color/Legends|tan]] [[Clothing/Legends|robes]]. The Tusken Raider also wore gloves, sandproof face bindings with a filtering sandmask and protective eye coverings, and an ammo [[Bandolier/Legends|bandolier]] connected to a belt.<ref name="VD">''[[Star Wars: The Phantom Menace: The Expanded Visual Dictionary]]''</ref> He wielded a [[Gaderffii/Legends|gaderffii]]<ref name="YJCCG" /> and used a<ref name="TPM" /> [[Cycler rifle/Legends|cycler rifle]]<ref name="FF83">[[The Official Star Wars Fact File 83|''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 83]]</ref> while he shot at the podracers.<ref name="TPM" />

==Behind the scenes==
UrrOr'Ruur first appeared in the [[1999]] [[prequel trilogy]] film [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']].<ref name="TPM" /> He was first identified<ref name="YJCCG" /> in [[2001]]<ref name="Calendar">{{Decipher|url=youngjedi/cardlists/index.html|text=Young Jedi Collectible Card Game Card Lists}}</ref> with a card released in the [[Boonta Eve Podrace (YJCCG)|Boonta Eve Podrace]] expansion to the [[Young Jedi Collectible Card Game]] published by [[Decipher]].<ref name="YJCCG" />
